title: Elysium Spa Collagen Daily Wipes, 30 Pack
features: COLLAGEN BENEFITS: Elysium Spa Collagen Facial Wipes improves the health of skin. Collagen has beneficial properties, improving skin elasticity and retaining moisture to help reduce wrinkles and lines.
RESEALABLE: Each pack of 30 ready to use facial wipes, quickly and easily reseals, keeping the collagen wipes moist and ready to use each day.
QUICK RESULTS: The Elysium Spa Collagen Facial Wipes, Face Mask and Konjac Sponge will help achieve quick results.
ALL SKIN TYPES: The Elysium Spa Collagen Facial Wipes are suitable for uses with all skin types.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, 30 pack of Collagen wipes, resealable packet
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Collagen Facial Wipes improves the health of skin. Collagen has beneficial properties, improving skin elasticity and retaining moisture to help reduce wrinkles and lines. Each pack of 30 ready to use facial wipes, quickly and easily reseals, keeping the collagen wipes moist and ready to use each day. The Elysium Spa Collagen Facial Wipes are suitable for uses with all skin types. Ready to use, 30 pack of Collagen wipes, resealable packet. Ingredients Aqua, Phenoxyethanol, Butylene Glycol, Collagen, Polysorbate 20, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice, Disodium Laureth Sulfosuccinate, Panthenol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Disodium EDTA, Methylparaben, Tocopheryl Acetate (Vitamin E). Directions Remove a wipe from the resealable packet, gently wipe your face until clean, dispose of the used wipe, and close the packet tightly after use to keep the remaining wipes moist. See more
